name: tpch_teste
note: The original golden vector - pinned since CR-014. If this changes, the Java-Go contract is broken.

name: empty_properties
note: Covers putInt(properties.size()) with size 0 and no iteration. Catches an off-by-one on the count.

name: multibyte_bmp_ascii_compatible_keys
note: Values containing a non-ASCII character that is still in the BMP (☃ snowman). Java String.length() counts UTF-16 code units (= 1 here). A buggy Go impl that uses UTF-8 byte count (= 3 bytes) diverges.

name: surrogate_pair_emoji
note: Values containing an astral-plane character (🚀 rocket emoji). Java String.length() counts 2 UTF-16 surrogate code units; UTF-8 takes 4 bytes. The most reliable way to catch both glyph-count and byte-count implementations on the Go side.

name: multiple_keys_sorted_order_check
note: Map out of alphabetical order on purpose. ImmutableSortedMap.copyOf reorders; catches a Go impl that iterates Go's randomized map order.
